title: Nvidia’s Vera chip is the US$200 billion bet Jensen Huang doesn’t want you to overlook

title: Nigerian fintech Sycamore wants $29 million in deposits after MFB acquisition
summary: The move reflects a broader shift among Nigerian fintechs that are increasingly acquiring microfinance banking licences to gain direct access to deposits and cheaper capital.

title: Paystack’s first Dashboard rebuild in a decade brings AI into merchant operations
summary: Paystack has launched the first full rebuild of its Dashboard in a decade, introducing simplified navigation structure, mobile parity, and an AI-powered Command Centre.

title: OpenAIの内部モデルが数学の未解決問題を証明──OpenAIは「重要な転換点」、フィールズ賞受賞数学者は「画期的な成果」と評価
summary: OpenAIは、約80年未解決だった離散幾何学の問題について、同社のAIがこれまでの予想を反証し、その証明が正しいことを外部の数学者らが検証したと発表。今回の成果を数学とAIの両分野にとっての「重要な転換点」だと位置付ける。
